---
name: Member Nomination
about: Nominate a contributor to become a Member of the Transports Working Group.
title: 'Member Nomination: @[username]'
labels: ['nomination', 'member']
assignees: ''
---

**Nominee:** @[GitHub handle]
**Sponsors:** @[GitHub handles]
**Organizations represented:** [Must be 2+ different orgs among sponsors, or 1 Core/Lead Maintainer]

**Contributions:**
- [ ] Link to merged PR(s)
- [ ] Link to issues filed/triaged
- [ ] Link to discussions participated in
- [ ] Duration of participation: [X months]

**Sponsor Attestations:**
- [ ] Sponsors confirm nominee demonstrates community values
- [ ] Sponsors confirm nominee demonstrates sustained engagement
